translation.title: Ntụgharị Asụsụ ziri Ezi & Ndehie
translation.description: Ntụgharị asụsụ ziri ezi ma nke dabara nke ọma n'omenala maka dọkụmentị, weebụsaịtị, na ụzọ mgbasa ozi.

transcription.title: Ndepụta Okwu & Ndekonye Olu
transcription.description: Ndepụta okwu nke ọkachamara nke ọdiyo/vidiyo yana ndekonye olu nke ọkachamara maka ọrụ gị.

proofreading.title: Nnyochaputạ Ndehie & Ndezi
proofreading.description: Jide n'aka na ọdịnaya nke Igbo gị agaghị enwe ntupọ site n'ọrụ nyochaputạ ndehie na ndezi ndị nke ọkachamara anyị.
